CommonActions.Record Created: {username} created a new record in the {module} page. Record: {target}.
CommonActions.Record Retrieved: {username} retrieved record details from {module} page. Record: {target}.
CommonActions.User created: {username} created a new user and sent a welcome email with a password reset link. Details: {target}.
CommonActions.Record Updated: {username} updated a record in the {module} page, Record : {target}.
CommonActions.Record Deleted: {username} deleted a record from the {module} page.
CommonActions.Viewed Document: {username} accessed document in the {cabinetName} cabinet. File Name : {target}
CommonActions.Document Updated: {username} modified a document in the  {cabinetName} cabinet.
CommonActions.Document Uploaded: {username} successfully uploaded a document to the {cabinetName} cabinet. {filters} , File Name : '{target}'
CommonActions.Document Upload Failed: {username} attempted to upload document to the {cabinetName} cabinet,the operation failed.  Error details : {target}.
CommonActions.Document Delete: {username} deleted a record from the {cabinetName} page.
CommonActions.Document Batch Upload: {username} attempted to upload a batch of documents in {cabinetName} cabinet.{filters}
CommonActions.Note Created: {username} created a new note. Note Content - {target}
CommonActions.MFA Verified: MFA verified successfully & authentication token issued for {username}. {filters}
CommonActions.Forgot Username: {username} requested username details via forgot username. {filters}
CommonActions.Reset Password: {username} has successfully reset the account password. {filters}
